Created attachment 249073
update patch

Let's update the port to the most recent version and take this opportunity to give potential users a notion of sFlow and IPFIX support.

Tested on podriere-devel, log from build available[1].

1. http://pkg.pansjar.eu/data/builder14stable-default/2024-03-10_14h26m39s/logs/nfdump-1.7.4.log
